name: Shoko Relay
overview: A custom metadata provider and automation toolset for integrating Plex and AnimeThemes with Shoko Server.

releases.release_notes:
**Changes:**
- Fix episode snapshot images array being incorrectly mapped to Primary instead of Backdrop images
- Prevent duplicate API scrobble requests when multiple TMDB episodes map to a single Shoko episode
- Replace unreliable IsWatched property evaluation with a strict LastPlayedAt null check in SyncToPlex.cs
- Optimize watched state batch syncing by passing updateStatsNow: false to intermediate SetEpisodeWatchedStatus calls
- Pass VfsShared.PathComparer to Distinct() operations for paths in VfsBuilder and SourceLinkService to correctly handle Windows case-insensitivity
- Switch from .sln to .slnx
- Add NLog to global using directives
- Bump Shoko.Abstractions to 6.0.0-alpha.75

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.16.4...v0.16.5

**Changes:**
- Add EmptyPlexTrashThreshold to AdvancedConfig to allow user-defined safety nets for automatic trash deletion
- Add grandparentTitle and parentIndex properties to PlexMetadataItem in PlexApi
- Add EmptyTrashWithSafetyAsync to PlexClient for percentage-based trash evaluation
- Integrate Plex trash evaluation into the Shoko PurgeMissingFiles endpoint and log reports
- Inject PlexClient into the ShokoRelay constructor to make it available for the background automation loop
- Append Plex trash execution to the scheduled Plex automation loop and manual trigger
- Expand Purge Missing dashboard UI confirmation modal and Settings Help modal
- Add trashOnly and threshold parameters to the /shoko/purge-missing endpoint in ShokoController
- Update PurgeMissingResult to include a trashOnly flag and track individual library prefixes for trashed items
- Skip Shoko database scans entirely when trashOnly is enabled
- Several minor optimizations have also been made that can be seen in the full changelog
- Update README/Controller.md documentation for the new trash features
- Bump Soko.Abstractions to 6.0.0-alpha.74

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.16.3...v0.16.4

**Changes:**

- Update SchedulePlexRefreshForSeriesAsync in ShokoController to follow up folder scans with a delayed Plex metadata refresh to ensure series data updates successfully when triggering manual actions via the VFS browser
- Append X-Plex-Container-Size and X-Plex-Container-Start pagination parameters to the GUID lookup query in PlexClient to satisfy new strict Plex API enforcement and eliminate log warnings
- Implement a static ConcurrentDictionary tracker inside SchedulePlexRefreshForSeriesAsync to safely debounce rapid manual requests
- Prevent massive stack traces from polluting the logs when a Plex discovery fallback connection fails due to SSL/TLS certificate mismatches
- Add intelligent fallback logic to RefreshSectionPathAsync in PlexClient to automatically infer correct Plex paths when Path Mappings are missing
- Format the dynamically guessed path using the target server's native path separator, ensuring cross-platform stability when Shoko and Plex run on different operating systems (e.g. Windows Host to Linux Docker)
- Update readme.md and the dashboard settings help to account for the path mappings not being required
- Bump Shoko.Abstractions to v6.0.0-alpha.73

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.16.2...v0.16.3

**Changes:**
- Optimize VFS directory enumeration, string allocations, disk I/O, symlink resolution, and reduce memory allocations
- Execute global root cleanup using Parallel.ForEach to concurrently delete VFS series folders
- Refactor source path resolution in BuildSeries to identify valid video files in a single pass
- Parallelize VFS Audit and Image Sync Service file operations
- Track elapsed runtimes across Plex automations in both the server log and log files
- Update VfsBuilder.Audit to log explicit starting and completed metrics to Shoko Server's main log
- Disable browser caching on log file endpoints ensuring dashboard log links always return the current log
- Add VFS Audit task mapping to the dashboard ensuring it is correctly synchronized with the dashboard buttons 
- Update buildAllTab in browser.js to explicitly preserve the seasonId property when deep-copying season objects
- Fix ghost entries appearing in both the AnimeThemes Player and VFS Browser after a series was deleted from Shoko
- Move VFS-specific data models and records into a new VfsModels.cs file to decouple data containers from execution logic
- Relocate GetThemeSourcePath, CleanupOrphanedFilesAndFolders, and season name formatting helpers to VfsHelper.cs for better modularity
- Centralize VFS Blueprint cache disk I/O logic in VfsShared.cs for cleaner integration across the codebase
- Extract Global Root Cleanup and AnimeThemes Blueprint Registration out of the primary VFS generation loop into dedicated private helper methods
- Bumped Shoko.Abstractions to v6.0.0-alpha.69

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.16.1...v0.16.2

For those that use them both the AnimeThemes torrent and curated mapping file have been updated (01/07/2026).

**Changes:**
- Exclude LinkedEntityImages for ITmdbSeason entities in GetAvailableImages to exclusively return cross-references matching their specific SeasonNumber
- Apply a stable sort to ISeries entities in GetAvailableImages to prioritize TMDB Series posters above TMDB Season posters
- Remove the multi-season restriction from PlexMetadata's MapSeason method
- Update ParseMappingContentWithComments to preserve user annotations and blank lines located above the CSV header, while strictly discarding any found below it
- Update SerializeMapping to dynamically inject preserved annotations at the top of the file, unconditionally followed by the standard CSV header
- Sort at-mapping entries chronologically by Year, then naturally by file path
- Fix a bug causing a negative 'Reused' count in the at-map build report by capturing the existing cache size before the parallel processing loop begins
- Delete s_tmdbAllOrderingsContainsCache and s_orderingCoordsCache from PlexMapping to avoid stale data ever being present
- Refactor SelectPreferredTmdbOrdering in PlexMapping to project the AllOrderings evaluation into a tuple before sorting
- Bump Shoko.Abstractions to v6.0.0-alpha.67

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.16.0...v0.16.1

Another round of Shoko Server image changes.

**Changes:**
- Add the new Shoko.Abstractions.Metadata.Image.Options to ImageHelper, ImageSyncService, and ShokoController
- Refactor GetAvailableImages in ImageHelper to utilize the new ImageFilteringOptions class for querying entities
- Refactor PurgeEntityImagesAsync in ImageSyncService to utilize ImageCrossReferenceFilteringOptions directly from the entity context rather than the IImageManager
- Update PurgeEpisodeImages in ShokoController to pass the new ImageCrossReferenceFilteringOptions object to GetAllImageCrossReferences
- Restructure dashboard.cshtml and dashboard.css to utilize a more compact two-column grid layout for VFS sections
- Add a new "Cour" input field to the AnimeThemes MP3 section to filter batch operations to the current season
- Update Shoko.Abstractions dependency to v6.0.0-alpha.66

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.15.0...v0.16.0
